channel.title: A few questions about wp-comments
channel.description:
Hi, everyone!
I was able to install the wp-comments package in my frontend project. But a few questions have emerged.
1. How to make it so that the user can reply to some comment (create a child for it), and not just write a new one?
2. How to make it so that the user can delete his comment?
Thanks!

item.title: A few questions about wp-comments
item.dc:creator: calore912
item.description:
Hi, everyone!

I was able to install the wp-comments package in my frontend project. But a few questions have emerged.

  1. How to make it so that the user can reply to some comment (create a child for it), and not just write a new one?

  2. How to make it so that the user can delete his comment?

Thanks!

Read full topic
